name: forge
description: Production-grade agent team orchestration with two modes: greenfield (PRD + design + build) and existing codebase (explore + plan + build). Cross-model adversarial review via Codex.

codex_enabled.description: Enable Codex adversarial review (requires codex-plugin-cc installed). Default: true

stitch_enabled.description: Enable Google Stitch MCP for visual design generation in greenfield mode. Default: false

prod_paths.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for paths requiring hard Codex gate. Default: infrastructure/**,terraform/**,k8s/**,helm/**,production/**. Available as CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_PROD_PATHS env var.

default_generator_model.description: Model for generator agents: opus (quality) or sonnet (speed/cost). Default: opus
